brief_summary: Implement control-plane v5.1.0 audit trail across 6 slices: first-class findings, delegation ledger, query-time join, /api/task + /api/metrics, control-report CLI, tool-target redaction, dashboard revamp
Independent validation of the v5.1.0 audit-trail diff: additive-API-only, stdlib-only, no gate reads the DB, 127.0.0.1 preserved, all seven eval suites green
Security review of tool-target redaction (AC7): confirm memory redactor runs before truncation so a key straddling the 200-char cutoff is still caught; no bodies indexed

Independent cross-family review of the full v6.0.0 diff vs origin/main against the record contract: spot-check the trust-chain gates, hunt uncovered behavior changes, execute suites, flag stubs as blocking
Fresh-context security review: destructive-pattern anchoring FP/FN, fail-open scan-text judgment, protect_harness coverage, uninstall path traversal, secret-pattern integrity, control-plane exposure
Dead-function census over scripts/, hosts/, bench/ (callers per def, dispatch tables, eval-only classification)
Config-key drift census: schema/example keys vs code reads, asset reference graph, orphan hunt
Docs drift census: CLI claims vs argparse truth, restated canon, orphaned docs, broken links/images
Duplication census: eval-runner scaffolding, npm wrapper vs install.py, cross-module helper duplicates, bench
Execute pre-verified cuts: dead journal reader + ORCHESTRATE entry + inline import + hooklib dedup in stop_gate/sessionstart + install.py nits; doc counts via lint
Dedup cuts: run_evals repo-init helpers, redundant static case 01 deletion + lint-driven counts, bench metrics dead main, npm dead surface + first CI wiring of npm tests

Docs/config drift fixes: architecture protect-harness + record example + role table, control-plane count + lint watch list, tool-contracts lint class + guard keys, advisor retirement, schema gains protect_harness/enforcement, orphan deletions, CHANGELOG Unreleased restructure
